name: LK dispensor
description: Water dispensers come in several styles to suit different spaces and hydration needs, ranging from simple portable pumps to large floor-standing units with refrigeration
longDescription: Bottom-Loading Dispensers: These house the water bottle in a lower cabinet, eliminating the need to lift heavy jugs. They often feature sleek designs and multiple temperature settings. Top-Loading with Storage/Cooling Cabinet: These traditional units place the bottle on top and often include an 18-litre cooling cabinet or "mini-fridge" at the bottom for storing beverages. Tabletop & Countertop Models: Compact units designed for small kitchens or office desks. They provide the same hot and cold functionality but take up minimal surface area. Portable Electric Pumps: Budget-friendly, rechargeable devices that attach directly to the neck of a 20-litre bottle. They are ideal for camping, travel, or small household
